home.heroDesc: A multi-country digital marketplace connecting farmers, sellers, and buyers through transparent, secure, and efficient trading of agricultural commodities across South Asia and the Middle East.
home.featuresDesc: End-to-end trade execution from commodity listing to final delivery, with escrow payments, tokenized ownership, and cross-border compliance.
home.feature1Desc: Every lot passes warehouse quality checks — moisture, grade, and traceability verified before listing.
home.feature2Desc: Live bidding with anti-sniping protection, proxy bidding, and reserve prices for fair price discovery.
home.feature3Desc: Buyers post requirements, farmers and aggregators compete with quotes. Multi-round negotiation until the best deal is struck.
home.feature4Desc: Digital ownership tokens with HMAC-signed QR codes for tamper-proof warehouse redemption.
home.feature5Desc: Trade in INR, NPR, BTN, AED, SAR, OMR, or USD with real-time FX rates from Wise API.
home.feature6Desc: Full support for English, Hindi, Nepali, Dzongkha, and Arabic with right-to-left layouts.
home.step1Desc: Create your account as a Farmer, Seller, or Buyer. Complete KYC with country-specific documents for verified trading.
home.step2Desc: Farmers submit produce through warehouse intake with quality checks. Buyers browse the verified marketplace.
home.step3Desc: Place bids in live auctions or submit RFQ quotes. Multi-round negotiations help find the perfect price.
home.step4Desc: Secure multi-gateway payments with tax compliance. Receive a digital ownership token with signed QR code.
home.step5Desc: Present your QR code at the designated warehouse. Staff verifies the token and releases your commodity.
home.commoditiesDesc: From the Himalayan foothills to Gulf markets — quality-verified produce with full traceability and tokenized ownership.
home.countriesDesc: Trade seamlessly across South Asia and the Middle East with localized payment gateways, tax compliance, and KYC verification.
home.trustSec4: Zod validation on every API route
home.trustComp4: Immutable audit logs on all trades
home.ctaDesc: Whether you're a farmer seeking the best price or a buyer sourcing premium Himalayan commodities — Krishibridge connects you with verified, compliant partners.

hero.description: Krishibridge connects verified highland farmers and cooperatives with importers across India, Nepal, Bhutan, and the Gulf. Bid live, settle in your own currency, and redeem at the warehouse with a signed QR token.

sectionCommodities.title: Certified origin, indicative pricing, live inventory.
sectionCommodities.description: Each listing is lab-graded and compliance-checked before it goes live.

personas.eyebrow: For both sides of the trade
personas.title: One exchange, two workflows.

farmer.title: Farmers & aggregators
farmer.subtitle: Reach global buyers without a middleman.
farmer.b2: Accept bids in INR, NPR, BTN or USD
farmer.b3: Payouts released the moment the buyer confirms receipt

buyer.title: Importers & traders
buyer.subtitle: Source verified Himalayan commodities with confidence.
buyer.b1: Browse live lots with lab-certified grades
buyer.b2: Bid or send an RFQ for custom volumes
buyer.b3: Redeem at the warehouse with a signed QR token

how.title: Four steps from harvest to warehouse handover.

s1.title: Sign up & verify
s1.desc: Complete KYC in minutes. Farmers confirm identity and bank details; buyers confirm company and trade licence.

s2.title: List or discover
s2.desc: Sellers upload lots with origin, grade, lab reports, and photos. Buyers browse live lots or post an RFQ.

s3.title: Bid or negotiate
s3.desc: Open English auction with anti-sniping, or direct RFQ negotiation for large orders. Escrow holds funds.

s4.title: Pay & redeem at the warehouse
s4.desc: Settle in your own currency. Receive a signed QR token. Scan at the warehouse to take delivery.

features.title: What sets this exchange apart.

f1.title: Tokenised QR redemption
f1.desc: Every settled lot becomes a signed digital token. Present the QR at the warehouse to take delivery — tamper-proof, transferable, and auditable.

f2.title: Dzongkha, Hindi, Nepali, Arabic, English
f2.desc: The only commodity exchange with first-class Dzongkha support — plus RTL Arabic for Gulf importers.

f3.title: Settle in your own currency
f3.desc: INR, NPR, BTN, AED, SAR, OMR, USD. Transparent FX, no hidden spreads. Payouts reach farmers in the local rail they already use.

f4.title: Bank-grade security
f4.desc: Every account is KYC-verified. Every transaction is encrypted end-to-end. Every token is tamper-proof and verifiable offline.

f5.title: Verified origin and quality
f5.desc: Lab-tested grades, phytosanitary docs, and origin certificates attached to every lot — reviewed before going live.

f6.title: Live auctions + RFQ
f6.desc: Price discovery through open English auctions with anti-sniping, or direct quote requests for large custom orders.

features.securityNote: Technical specifications on encryption, token signing, and audit trails are available at /security.

heritage.title: Built on a decade of farmer-first technology.
heritage.description: KrishiBridge started as an AgriTech mission to bring precision farming within reach of every smallholder — weather intelligence, smart irrigation, and land protection. The commodity exchange is the next chapter: turning that verified ground truth into global market access.

weather.title: Weather Monitoring
weather.desc: Hyper-local climate data helps farmers plan sowing, harvest, and storage with confidence.

irrigation.title: Smart Irrigation
irrigation.desc: Soil-moisture aware irrigation schedules cut water waste and lift yield per acre.

land.title: Land Protection
land.desc: Soil health, boundary integrity, and compliance — monitored so farms stay productive year on year.

countriesSection.title: Six countries. Five languages. Seven currencies.
countriesSection.description: Localised for every market we serve — including first-class Dzongkha for Bhutan and RTL Arabic for the Gulf.

finalCta.title: Ready to list — or ready to buy?
finalCta.description: Join verified farmers, cooperatives, and importers trading Himalayan commodities across six countries.

footer.tagline: Cross-border agri-commodity exchange for South Asia and the Gulf.
footer.address: Headquartered in Sikkim, India. Serving South Asia & the Gulf.
